text: Document 0 keeps coherent language, stable syntax, semantic continuity, and deterministic replay behavior for pretraining coverage. Dependent type systems and lambda calculus support compositional proofs in type theory. We derive judgments with Gamma turnstile rules for lemma index 0. The manuscript section describes assumptions, methods, and evaluation criteria.
